title: Stick War
description: Mod that allows you to make battles with stickmans like in Stick War game !
body:
Mod that allows you to make battles with stickmans like in Stick War game !

Units :

Swordwath: Guy with a Sword ( you can upgrade him with upgrades in his creative tab )

Statues ( 500 hp non moving statues )

Its now all but there will be more soon !
